message:
fix(nostr): cap default_query_limit at 1000 and clamp per-request filter limit

Add upper bound validation for default_query_limit in config (reject
values > 1000) and clamp the per-request filter limit to MAX_QUERY_LIMIT
(1000) to prevent unbounded queries that could overwhelm relays or
exhaust connector resources.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
